_comment: Shipped preset for ACE-Step v1 text-to-audio (song generation). Read ONCE on first DB row creation; subsequent seeds preserve user edits.
label: ACE-Step v1 Song
description: Text-to-audio song generation via ACE-Step v1 (3.5B). main_prompt → tags (genre / mood / instruments), stage lyrics → song lyrics, stage duration → seconds of audio. Output is a single mp3 (COMFYTV_AUDIO).

tags.default: soft female vocals, kawaii pop, j-pop, piano, guitar, synthesizer, cheerful
